items.label: Architectural anchor fixtures (baths, showers, pools, saunas, medical positions, ELV circuits)
items.hint: List all special-location anchors extracted from architectural drawings. Each anchor drives automatic zone derivation. The DraftsMan runtime auto-populates from architectural extraction; engineer supplies manually for early-design pre-checks. Anchor type must be one of: bath_basin, shower_position, pool_basin, sauna_heater, medical_patient_position, elv_lighting_circuit_anchor. Each entry requires type, id, position (x_mm/y_mm/z_floor_mm), shape_kind, and 3-tier _extraction_source provenance. Conditional sub-fields: bath_kind (standard|whirlpool) for bath_basin; medical_group (0|1|2) for medical_patient_position; shower_head_height_mm for shower_position; whirlpool_pump_position for whirlpool bath_kind.

type.description: Anchor classification — drives zone-derivation rule selection

shape_kind.description: rectangular for baths; cylinder for pool/medical/sauna_heater

bath_kind.description: Required when type = bath_basin. whirlpool triggers INV-06 + D-3 pump-circuit check per BS 7671:2018 §701 + §701.512.2

medical_group.description: Required when type = medical_patient_position. Group 2 triggers IT system check (INV-03)

shower_head_height_mm.description: Required when type = shower_position. Drives Zone 1 ceiling height derivation per BS 7671:2018 §701 zone-table geometry

whirlpool_pump_position.description: Optional when bath_kind = whirlpool. Defaults to bath edge if absent; absence flagged as assumption by reviewer D-3

_extraction_source.description: 3-tier provenance: architectural_drawing_extraction (strongest), engineer_manual_entry (medium), inferred_from_room_type (weakest; triggers INV-09 MEDIUM + D-1 for safety-critical zones)

_provenance_note.description: Honest disclosure of how the anchor was located (≥40 chars). Drives INV-09 provenance audit.

items.label: Room geometry, classification, and environmental properties
items.hint: Room polygon in room-local coordinates, ceiling height, room_type from the 9-value enum, floor finish, and flags for external or wet-room conditions. room_type enum: bathroom, shower_room, swimming_pool_hall, sauna, medical_group_0_area, medical_group_1_ward, medical_group_2_theatre, external_landscape, other. room_polygon_mm must have ≥3 vertices. is_wet_room = true expands Zone 1 to full floor area per BS 7671:2018 §701 + IET GN7 wet-room commentary.

room_polygon_mm.description: Plan boundary vertices in room-local coordinates (≥3 vertices required)

floor_finish.description: Surface type; affects IP rating interpretation for floor-level fixtures

is_external.description: True for outdoor/external_landscape; drives §715/§522 IP routing for ELV circuits

is_wet_room.description: True when entire floor area is a wet zone. Expands Zone 1 to full room floor area at 2.25m AFF per BS 7671:2018 §701 + IET GN7 wet-room commentary (no §701 sub-clause for wet-room expansion in verified file — generic §701 citation applies)

ambient_temperature_c.description: Optional. Drives ELV de-rating for §715 luminaires in high-temperature environments (sauna, steam room). Reviewer D-5 flags when absent for sauna or medical_group_2_theatre rooms.

items.label: Jurisdiction (GB / KE / INT)
items.hint: Drives _clause_citation routing. GB → BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §X. KE → KS 1700:2018 §313 (route to BS 7671 §X). INT → IEC 60364-7-XXX §Y.

items.label: Existing fixtures for zone cross-check (used when no consumed lighting-layout intent is available)
items.hint: Engineer-supplied fixture list for early-design pre-check. Each entry: type, position, ip_rating, voltage_v, is_rcd_protected, and optional source_skill / source_skill_intent_path. When a consumed lighting-layout intent IS present the skill reads existing_fixtures from the intent instead (intent is the more recent authoritative source). Skip this field in runtime cascade context where lighting-layout intent is available.

type.description: Luminaire or appliance type (e.g. downlight, wall_light, shaver_socket, heated_towel_rail)

ip_rating.description: IEC 60529 IP code (e.g. IP44, IP65, IPX4)

is_rcd_protected.description: True when the circuit supplying this fixture has RCD protection

source_skill.description: Optional: originating skill id (e.g. lighting-layout, small-power)

source_skill_intent_path.description: Optional: filesystem path to the intent file this fixture was read from

items.label: Engineer zone polygon overrides for irregular geometry
items.hint: Override auto-derived zone polygons for corner baths, L-shaped pools, or other non-standard geometry. Each entry replaces one derived zone polygon. The original auto-derived polygon is preserved in IR with _overridden_by_engineer: true. zone_id must match a zones[] id in the IR. _reason must be ≥40 chars.

zone_id.description: Must match a zones[].id in the derived IR zones output

replacement_polygon_mm.description: Replacement zone boundary vertices in room-local coordinates (≥3 vertices)

_reason.description: Prose explanation for the override (≥40 chars). Preserved in IR alongside _overridden_by_engineer flag.

items.label: §710 Group 2 IT system commissioning data (medical theatre/ICU)
items.hint: Supply when §710 Group 2 rooms are present and IT system commissioning data is available ahead of compliance check. All sub-fields are optional within the object. Presence of this object requires at least one medical_patient_position anchor with medical_group = 2. Fields: isolating_transformer_va, insulation_monitoring_device_present, imd_alarm_response_time_s_observed (8 s typical per BS EN 61557-8), supplementary_bonding_verified, supplementary_bonding_resistance_ohm_observed (≤0.2 Ω per §710), safety_service_category (1|2|3 per HTM 06-01).

isolating_transformer_va.description: Rated capacity of the §710 isolating transformer in VA

insulation_monitoring_device_present.description: True when IMD is installed per BS EN 61557-8 requirement for Group 2

imd_alarm_response_time_s_observed.description: Observed IMD alarm response time in seconds. 8 s typical per BS EN 61557-8.

supplementary_bonding_verified.description: True when supplementary equipotential bonding within the patient environment has been verified

supplementary_bonding_resistance_ohm_obs.description: Measured bonding resistance in ohms. Must be ≤0.2 Ω per §710 body text requirement.

safety_service_category.description: Safety service category per HTM 06-01 NHS technical memorandum (1 = >15 s, 2 = 0.5–15 s, 3 = <0.5 s). NOT a BS 7671 sub-clause.

items.label: IES file paths for ELV §715 luminaire IP cross-check
items.hint: For ELV §715 luminaire IP cross-check via consumed lighting-layout intent. Mirrors photometric-analysis IES handling at v1.0: provide manufacturer IES files or use synthetic fallback paths at shared/photometric/ies/<type>.ies. Each entry: luminaire_type (must match a type in lighting-layout intent) + path + _source provenance (≥40 chars). When no IES files are supplied, IP cross-check falls back to declared ip_rating on existing_fixtures[].

luminaire_type.description: Must match a luminaire type symbol in the upstream lighting-layout intent or existing_fixtures[] type

path.description: Filesystem path to LM-63-2002 IES file, OR synthetic fallback path shared/photometric/ies/<type>.ies

_source.description: Provenance: manufacturer + product code + retrieval date + verification_status caveat (≥40 chars)
